summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLARITY Executive Coaching Dashboard security hardening features. All new security features working perfectly: force password change, admin participant controls, data isolation, and authentication security. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend-backend integration excellent.
passed_tests: Force password change flow: login -> redirect to /change-password -> password change -> redirect to dashboard
Change password API endpoint POST /api/auth/change-password (current_password + new_password)
force_password_change flag correctly set to false after password change
Settings page at /settings shows change password form (non-forced mode)
Admin can create participant with force_password_change: true
Admin can reset participant password via POST /api/participants/{id}/reset-password
Admin can toggle deactivate/activate participant via PUT /api/participants/{id}/deactivate
Deactivated participant cannot login (returns 403 Forbidden)
Admin can archive participant via DELETE /api/participants/{id}
Archived participant removed from participants list
Data isolation: participant A cannot access participant B's sessions/resources/schedule (403 Forbidden)
File download requires authentication (no public URLs)
No admin credentials visible in frontend UI or logs
Sidebar shows Settings link for both admin and participant
Admin participants page shows dropdown with View Details, Reset Password, Deactivate, Archive actions
Admin dashboard, participant dashboard, resource hub, schedule, community all functional
Authentication security: brute force protection, invalid login handling
httpOnly cookies authentication working correctly
Role-based access control (participants blocked from admin routes)
Backend-frontend integration via authenticated API calls

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all security features and UI components working)
